Spending it on wings in burst turns will help

(Or Hameln, but I like to buff her keyflare a bit more)
Tawil/Clem/Hameln/Horla, rouse priority in that order generally.
Your shielding generally sucks so you will be relying on a lot of str down to take the edge off of hits
Every member of your team has that in one form or another.
What would 'good sheilding' look like?
enough that you don't mind getting beat on
Enough to block the enemies
mother tree with no aoe can be a bit tricky

Tawil can fetch a few particularly useful cards during the mother tree fight:
Wanda's 4-cost can apply aoe str down to help survive the spawn phases
Tinct's 2-cost can cure weak/vuln/fragile
If the counter or bleed is chewing you up clem heals can come in clutch
Pandia can remove counter but it might not be worth

From what ive done so far, the counter and debuffs aren't the problem, tawil can easily dps through single chunky boss healthbars,  it's just that the swarm of enemies kill me pretty quickly after i run out of gas

What sort of team does Lotan shine in? I got her AA so I’d like to take her to whack something
could try Saya Lotan or Castor Lotan
or even Lotan Helot (Helot support Lotan)

Unsurprisingly, Lotan works in much the same comp that Mouchette works in, and mostly with the same characters. Lotan can do a lot of her damage with her OE exalt or with her image by getting a lot of copies of Blade of Defiance. Unlike Mouchette, Lotan doesn’t suddenly invent a huge source of temporary flat damage or scaling final damage for her strikes, so someone has to provide that to her.

Aequor characters tend to lack the role compression for vuln+weak and generally build more tentacle damage than strength, so the easier ones to rely on will be Caro (Helot and/or Saya) or Ultra (Horla and/or Clementine.)

Personally, since Lotan can be exalt reliant, I find it’s better to skip Saya and use a lot of embryo fusion to feed her aliemus, but Corrosion has a way of making even a halfassed DPS function. The other primary difference between Lotan and Mouchette is that Mouchette likes it when people play their strikes, encouraging this behavior with her exalt, and Lotan doesn’t really help or care.

Blade of Defiance reduces its cost whenever any strike is played, but those strikes don’t have a gajillion free damage on them, so you’ll want to use your arithmetica on Lotan’s attacks most of the time…

If you’re certifiably insane and have invested a lot into Leigh, there is also at least one wack job who can attest to the incredible permanent strength generation she is capable of, which goes a lot farther than you might otherwise think on a character whose image generates a lot of free multi hitting cards.
